Applying to 11011000
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 AND 26 = AND(I 2,I 6) = AND(0,0) = 0
1 AND 37 = AND(I 3,I 7) = AND(1,0) = 0
2 C 2n = NOT(1) = 0
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 C 5n = NOT(1) = 0
6 I 0 = 1
7 I 1 = 1

\boxed{00000011}
